{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315243343A6907BC2DAAC247FD1"}"},"total":27},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7597823652554195736","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好的，看得出加了不少动漫角色，还改成中文名了，挺看好的，别断更了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769009452,"group_id":"7586941804365220888","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"懒得写","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8H3/OXYYI2xblNnOTqQ5I1Xw9nKrfKTC0G4z2rwYD/K","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/93e533e0a6af45b1851dfbde0ac55f0d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794664&x-signature=ChYEK%2FeRkLqH%2Fbr499%2BtTLvBaGk%3D","user_id":"2184067430759491","user_name":"小白不想"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2184067430759491","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7586941804365220888","book_info":{"abstract":"游戏已死，创意凋零。

这个世界的玩家们，早已陷入“追求真实”的怪圈。当每款游戏都成了枯燥的模拟器，所有人都在渴望改变，却无人能点燃那簇新生的火苗。

直到林自穿越而来，并绑定了【新奇值系统】。

制作让观众感到“新鲜”的游戏，就能兑换一切——来自另一个世界的瑰宝。

于是，实习期他用《链在一起》赚到第一桶金；

毕设大赛，他带领团队以现象级VR游戏《米塔》横扫全国，惊艳四座；

从此，一条通往“第九艺术之神”的道路，在他脚下铺开——

《八幡》《海上狼人杀》《鹅鸭杀》《超阈限空间》…一个个颠覆想象的游戏，在他手中化作现实。

《生化危机》《艾尔登法环》《赛博朋克2077》…一部部震撼世界的3A大作，让全球玩家沉浸其中，无法自拔。

当《APEX》《搜打撤类大合集》《绝地求生》《永劫无间》诸多网游接连引爆全球，当虚拟世界“绿洲”成为人类第二家园——

世人终于想起，曾被他支配的恐惧，与他所开创的诸多游戏体系。

“我说过，好玩的游戏，才配叫游戏。”
“而现在——”
“欢迎来到，我的游戏纪元。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o29605f71cbbd6b4bdb825b6f850123be~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"无限白","author_id":"","book_id":"7586941804365220888","book_name":"幻想游戏制作：从米塔到绿洲之父","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383840","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4958人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7586949209572508184","read_count":"4958","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"496696"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"224","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,校花","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/ab7d31c09515a0016553c7ffb96ea715~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779434673&x-signature=J2pwt1ajNzPHTRqeXtz64CjaKzo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3628822614255511","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315243343A6907BC2DAAC247FD1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5106,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5285,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":4232},"user_action":{"author":0,"aut
